title: AiCompiler – a language where the LLM is the CPU
abstract: Tired of sluggish software? Welcome AiCompiler, where large language models serve as the CPU to deliver smooth and seamless performance. Say goodbye to long waits and hello to efficient switching! Join us and compile smarter languages with ease.
abstract_zh: 你还在为笨拙的软件卡顿而烦恼吗？AiCompiler来了！这里，大模型就是CPU，让你的操作流畅如丝滑。告别漫长的等待，享受无缝切换的高效体验吧！快来加入我们，一起编译出更聪明的语言！
